name: A & B Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Schiller Park / NW Cook County IL area (specifics not public)
recent_news: Operating entity L.E.T. Ltd. dba A & B Bus Service filed Ch.11 bankruptcy (Case 19-16829, N.D. Ill.) on 6/12/2019; Yelp listing marked CLOSED as of 2026. Likely defunct.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET — operating entity bankrupt 2019 and Yelp shows CLOSED. If any assets/contracts remain, only a distressed asset purchase, not a going-concern tuck-in.

name: New Bus Facility-Maytav Bus Co
principals: Not publicly disclosed; member of NJSBCA
districts_or_customers: Serves Camden, Burlington, Gloucester, and PA counties (Philadelphia, Delaware, Montgomery, Bucks); HQ Oaklyn/Haddon Twp NJ with Camden facility at 1501 Pine St
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (2026): 55 power units, 45 drivers, Conditional safety rating (Oct 2019 compliance review), MCS-150 updated 4/14/2025; active interstate passenger carrier (USDOT 2321377). 2 crashes / 0 OOS in trailing 24 mo.
fit_notes: Plausible tuck-in: independent NJ school bus contractor with ~55 buses, ADA/wheelchair fleet, bi-state Philly/South Jersey footprint. Conditional safety rating is a diligence flag worth tracking. Camden 'New Bus Facility' address is one of Maytav's yards, not a separate company.

name: Leake Academy Bus #8 Inc
owner_or_parent: Owner-operator route entity associated with Leake Academy (private K-12, Madden/Philadelphia MS)
districts_or_customers: Leake Academy (private Methodist school, Madden MS, ~626 students PreK-12)
recent_news: None located. Naming convention ('Bus #8 Inc') and tiny scale indicate a single-route owner-operator LLC contracting to Leake Academy, typical of MS private/public school sub-route model.
fit_notes: NOT A MEANINGFUL TUCK-IN — single-route owner-operator LLC (one bus) serving one private school. Employee count in source data (33) appears overstated/data-error. No platform value to Summit.

name: Duncan Sherman School Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: First Student Inc. (EQT Infrastructure) — via Mid States School Bus
principals: Dean Carroll (former Mid States GM, retained post-acquisition)
districts_or_customers: Eastern NE / South Dakota districts under Mid States platform (~20 districts, ~200 buses combined)
recent_news: Address explicitly references 'Mid States School Bus Inc 216, Wayne NE 68787.' First Student (FirstGroup, now EQT Infra) acquired Mid States School Bus, Inc. on 3/18/2021; Duncan Sherman is a co-located affiliate at the Wayne, NE Mid States facility — now under First Student.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET — co-located at Mid States School Bus address in Wayne NE; Mid States acquired by First Student (EQT) in March 2021. Already under a strategic/PE-owned platform; not an independent tuck-in opportunity.

name: Bruhn Logan Sch Bus No 2 LLC
principals: William Bruhn (per NM PED School Bus Contractor List); Edwin Bruhn family (Bruhn Enterprises, Logan NM concrete/holding co.)
districts_or_customers: Logan Municipal Schools (Logan NM) — NM contracts buses to private owner-operators by route
recent_news: Listed on NM Public Education Dept School Bus Contractor List (4/23/2020). 'No 2 LLC' naming indicates a single-bus route LLC under NM's owner-operator contractor model; Bruhn family also operates Bruhn Enterprises (ready-mix concrete) in Logan NM.
fit_notes: NOT A MEANINGFUL TUCK-IN — single-bus owner-operator LLC under NM's per-route contractor system in a town of ~1,000 people. Employee count in source (33) is a data error; real headcount is 1-2 drivers. No platform/scale value for Summit.
